case_title: INTER-STATE SECURITY INC. VS. FROG DESIGN INC. et al

docket_entries.description: AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF INTER-STATE SECURITY, INC., WILL RECOVER NOTHING ON ITS COMPLAINT. CROSS-COMPLAINANT FROG DESIGN INC. WILL RECOVER $25,000 ON ITS CROSS-COMPLAINT, PLUS INTEREST AT THE STATUTORY RATE AND STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT. NEITHER PARTY SHALL RECOVER ITS ATTORNEYS' FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTER-STATE SECURITY INC. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT FROG DESIGN INC. JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE SEP-24-2009.
ARBITRATOR JOHN SPENCER WORDEN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-25-2009 THROUGH DEC-24-2009.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-02-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS COMPLAINANT FROG DESIGN INC. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT INTER-STATE SECURITY INC. ROES 1 THROUGH 50
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY DEFENDANT FROG DESIGN INC. AS TO PLAINTIFF INTER-STATE SECURITY INC.
ANSWER TO CROSS COMPLAINT FILED BY CROSS DEFENDANT INTER-STATE SECURITY INC.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-14-2009. JUN-19-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR VINCENT ALEX RUIZ.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR MICHAEL ANTHONY DUNCHEON.

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON APR-02-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. FEB-02-2010 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $4,079.17 COSTS, FEB. 12, 2010 FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTER-STATE SECURITY INC.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT FROG DESIGN INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTER-STATE SECURITY INC. SERVED MAR-23-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FROG DESIGN INC.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTER-STATE SECURITY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FROG DESIGN INC. DOES 1-50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-19-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-14-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-04-2009
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-02-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR WORDEN, JOHN SPENCER
